findings.evidence: Grep hits: lines 140-144 prove `IsCoinvariant.smul` by `rw [map_smul, hm]; rfl`, and lines 162-164 prove `map_coact` by `ext; simpa [baseCoact] using hm.symm`.
findings.fix: Replace the terminal `rfl` with an explicit tensor rewrite/simp lemma such as `TensorProduct.smul_tmul'`, and have `ofCoinvariant.map_coact` cite `IsCoinvariant.smul r hm` rather than re-proving it through unfolding-heavy `simpa`.
findings.issue: `IsCoinvariant.smul` closes the tensor-scalar normalization with bare `rfl`, relying on the definitional shape of scalar action on `M ⊗[R] C`; `ofCoinvariant.map_coact` then hides the same normalization behind `simpa [baseCoact] using hm.symm`.

summary: One proof relies on undocumented definitional equality for tensor scalar action, and the same hidden step is reused in the morphism proof. Make the scalar-tensor rewrite explicit so later changes to tensor-product instances or coercions do not silently break this API.
